Navigate to checkout when clicking the M: Navigate to checkout when clicking the Mini-Basket, instead of opening the drawer.
Toggle to disable opening the Mini-Cart: Toggle to disable opening the Mini-Basket drawer when clicking the basket icon, and instead navigate to the checkout page.
The editor does not display the real cou: The editor does not display the real count value, but a placeholder to indicate how it will look on the front-end.
Toggle to display the total price of pro: Toggle to display the total price of products in the shopping basket. If no products have been added, the price will not display.
Toggle to open the Mini-Cart drawer when: Toggle to open the Mini-Basket drawer when a shopper adds a product to their basket.
When opened, the Mini-Cart drawer gives: When opened, the Mini-Basket drawer gives shoppers quick access to view their selected products and checkout.
Mini-Cart in cart and checkout pages: Mini-Basket in basket and checkout pages
Select how the Mini-Cart behaves in the: Select how the Mini-Basket behaves in the Basket and Checkout pages. This might affect the header layout.
